channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Payson Hypercharger 5 — $2,300
item.description:
$2,300 · Very Good · Joe 's Gear Outlet

Bass weighs 9.2lbs with 19mm string spacing. One blemish by truss rod cavity shown in pic. Scale is 37”-34”. Loads of tonal options described in one of the photos. Ebony fingerboard. Comes with gigbag.

item.title: Fender American Standard Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2008 - Candy Cola — $1,399.99
item.description:
$1,399.99 · Very Good · Tone Central Station

Remaining true to its legendary roots, the new Fender American Standard Precision Bass® delivers everything you would expect from the iconic company that started it all. From the new, lightweight tuners to the High Mass Vintage bridge, this bass embodies the modern interpretation of a classic design.


Product Specs

Body

Alder

Body Finish

Gloss Urethane

Body Shape

Precision Bass®

Bridge

4-Saddle HiMass™ Vintage (String-Through-Body or Top-Load)

Color

Candy Cola

Configuration

Split Single-Coil

Control Knobs

Knurled Flat-Top

Controls

Master Volume, Master Tone

Fingerboard

Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius

9.5" (241 mm)

Fret Size

Medium Jumbo

Hardware Finish

Chrome

Middle Pickup

American Standard Alnico V Split Single-Coil Precision Bass®

Model Name

American Standard Precision Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, Candy Cola, 3-Ply Parchment Pickguard

Neck Finish

Satin Urethane Finish on Back of Neck with Gloss Urethane Headstock Face

Neck Material

Maple

Neck Shape

Modern "C"

Number of Frets

20

Nut Material

Synthetic Bone

Nut Width

1.625" (41.3 mm)

Orientation

Right-Hand

Pickup Configuration

Split Single-Coil

Pickup Switching

None

Position Inlays

White Dot

Refinement Neck Material

Maple

Refinement Neck Shape

C Shape

Scale Length

34" (864 mm)

Series

American Standard

String Nut

Synthetic Bone

Truss Rod Wrench

3/16" Hex (Allen) - NOT INCLUDED

Truss Rods

Posiflex™ Graphite Neck Support Rods

Tuning Machines

Fender® "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle Keys with Tapered Shafts



Check out the video on this bass.


This beauty is in EXCELLENT condition. It plays and sounds GREAT! Comes with the Fender hard shell case (shown) and it weighs 8.82lbs.


Tone Central Station offers a 7 day return / Satisfaction Guarantee on this guitar. If you have any questions, please feel free to message us!

item.title: Squier Mini Precision Bass - Laurel Fingerboard, 2-Color Sunburst — $220.73
item.description:
$220.73 · Brand New · MSP Web

*Brand New Instrument in Pristine Condition!
**Squier Authorized Dealers in Quebec City, Canada!!

The Squier Mini Precision Bass is the perfect companion for players seeking a reduced-size instrument with classic styling and familiar Fender tone. Highlights include a thin and lightweight body, a short-scale neck with an easy-to-play "C"-shaped profile, a Squier split single-coil pickup with volume and tone controls for sonic variety, and a hardtail bridge for solid tuning stability.

Features : 

  • 100% Designed by Fender
  • Thin and lightweight body
  • Short-scale neck
  • Split single-coil Precision Bass pickup
  • Sealed die-cast tuning machines

---

[1] Our listings may use generic pictures of the same model or pictures from a different unit of the same model. Ask us if you want to see some pictures of the available units.

[2] Our Shipping Flat Rates or free shipping include full insurance of the total value of the item, and apply for most Metropolitan areas in North America. Locations outside major Metropolitan areas might be subject to EXTRA shipping costs for the buyer. If that situation applies, please send us a message including your ZIP code to verify your personalized and accurate quote on shipping rates and extra fees.

[3] All Custom fees are the responsibilities of the buyer. Buyer must contact Custom to insure a correct custom rate. We cannot do any custom quote or be responsible for any customs fees.

[4] All instruments are inspected and set up before shipping, therefore all boxes could be opened. We may also ship in a different box if we judge it is more secure to use a better packaging. If an instrument needs a setup at destination, there are the sole buyer responsibilities as the instrument has been verified and set up before shipping.

[5] There is NO return for international transactions and overseas shipping. Our return policy does not apply to International transactions, only to the Canadian market. It is the Buyer’s responsibility to verify if the manufacturer will accept the warranty for an international transaction, otherwise they will be considered as used.

[6] If an item arrives Damaged, please send us pictures of the external box and damage within the first 24 hours. Failure to do so will automatically void the insurance with the carrier. Keep the box until further notice and wait for our instructions for the next step. Having an instrument setup by yourself or a non-certified technician could void the warranty and insurance on shipping.

[7] All used items are final sales, the return policy does not apply.


Visit our website or call us anytime if you need more information +1-418-831-9010 !

item.title: Fender American Professional Classic Precision Bass - Maple Fingerboard, Faded Lake Placid Blue — $1,662.88
item.description:
$1,662.88 · Brand New · MSP Web

*Brand New Instrument in Pristine Condition!
**Fender Authorized Dealers in Quebec City, Canada!!

The perfect blend of vintage charm and modern performance – the American Professional Classic Precision Bass. Under the hood, the vintage-inspired Coastline ’60 split-coil Precision Bass pickup delivers depth, punch and articulation while the sleek Modern “C” neck provides exceptional comfort and playability. Fender ‘lollipop’ tuners deliver classic looks and precise tuning stability. Boasting custom-faded vintage and signature Fender finishes, this professional-grade instrument looks as good as it sounds. From studio to stage, The American Professional Classic Precision Bass All the soul of a goldenera Fender, evolved for today’s player.

Features : 

  • Alder Body
  • Coastline '60 split-coil Precision Bass pickup
  • Modern "C"-shaped neck with 9.5"-radius fingerboard and Medium Jumbo frets
  • Vintage-style Hardware
  • Greasebucket Tone System
  • Included gigbag

---

If an instrument needs a setup at destination, there are the sole buyer responsibilities as the instrument has been verified and set up before shipping.

[5] There is NO return for international transactions and overseas shipping. Our return policy does not apply to International transactions, only to the Canadian market. It is the Buyer’s responsibility to verify if the manufacturer will accept the warranty for an international transaction, otherwise they will be considered as used.

item.title: Fender Player II Modified Precision Bass Active - Rosewood Fingerboard, Olympic Pearl — $1,191.97
item.description:
$1,191.97 · Brand New · MSP Web

*Brand New Instrument in Pristine Condition!
**Fender Authorized Dealers in Quebec City, Canada!!

Gear up and get ready to take your performance to the next level with Player II Modified. Featuring key upgrades for the modern guitarist and bassist, these versatile instruments are designed to handle anything you can throw at them.

The Player II Modified Active Precision Bass is a classic bass with the modern player in mind. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or 1-piece maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. The alder body provides classic Fender punch and is available in a variety of exciting new finishes. The Player II Modified Precision Bass Neck and Noiseless Jazz Bass Bridge Pickups deliver classic Fender thump and growl while eliminating unwanted noise and the all-new active preamp with passive tone control and improved EQ section gives players the perfect tool to dial in their favorite tones. The 4-saddle HiMass bridge, tapered-shaft tuners and TUSQ nut all combine to keep tuning incredibly stable for even the most demanding performances.

Upgrade your arsenal today with the Player II Modified Active Precision Bass

Features : 

  • Modern "C" Neck Profile with 9.5“-Radius Fingerboard and Rolled Edges

---

[1] Our listings may use generic pictures of the same model or pictures from a different unit of the same model. Ask us if you want to see some pictures of the available units.

[2] Our Shipping Flat Rates or free shipping include full insurance of the total value of the item, and apply for most Metropolitan areas in North America. Locations outside major Metropolitan areas might be subject to EXTRA shipping costs for the buyer. If that situation applies, please send us a message including your ZIP code to verify your personalized and accurate quote on shipping rates and extra fees.

[3] All Custom fees are the responsibilities of the buyer. Buyer must contact Custom to insure a correct custom rate. We cannot do any custom quote or be responsible for any customs fees.

[4] All instruments are inspected and set up before shipping, therefore all boxes could be opened. We may also ship in a different box if we judge it is more secure to use a better packaging. If an instrument needs a setup at destination, there are the sole buyer responsibilities as the instrument has been verified and set up before shipping.

[5] There is NO return for international transactions and overseas shipping. Our return policy does not apply to International transactions, only to the Canadian market. It is the Buyer’s responsibility to verify if the manufacturer will accept the warranty for an international transaction, otherwise they will be considered as used.

[6] If an item arrives Damaged, please send us pictures of the external box and damage within the first 24 hours. Failure to do so will automatically void the insurance with the carrier. Keep the box until further notice and wait for our instructions for the next step. item.title: Fender Player II Mustang Bass PJ - Rosewood Fingerboard, Rallye Orange — $882.94
item.description:
$882.94 · Brand New · MSP Web

*Brand New Instrument in Pristine Condition!
**Fender Authorized Dealers in Quebec City, Canada!!

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender sound and style with the Player II Mustang Bass PJ — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Mustang Bass PJ radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 19 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass and Single-Coil J bass pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. The 3-way toggle switch lets you easily dial in everything this versatile pickup set has to offer, while an adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Mustang Bass PJ has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features : 

  • Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass and Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass Pickups
  • 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
  • Open-Gear Tuning Machines

---

[1] Our listings may use generic pictures of the same model or pictures from a different unit of the same model. Ask us if you want to see some pictures of the available units.

Locations outside major Metropolitan areas might be subject to EXTRA shipping costs for the buyer. If that situation applies, please send us a message including your ZIP code to verify your personalized and accurate quote on shipping rates and extra fees.

If an instrument needs a setup at destination, there are the sole buyer responsibilities as the instrument has been verified and set up before shipping.

[5] There is NO return for international transactions and overseas shipping. Our return policy does not apply to International transactions, only to the Canadian market. [6] If an item arrives Damaged, please send us pictures of the external box and damage within the first 24 hours. Failure to do so will automatically void the insurance with the carrier. item.title: Revelation RBJ-67 3-Tone Sunburst 2019 Electric Bass Guitar — $306.74
item.description:
$306.74 · Excellent · Sell Us Your Guitar

Here for sale we have a Revelation RBJ-67 Electric Bass in 3-Tone Sunburst finish. Made in China in 2019, This bass features a bolt-on construction comprising an Okoume body, Maple neck and a 20-fret Maple fingerboard. Chrome hardware is fitted including a Wilkinson M Series 4-saddle top-loading bridge & vintage-style open-geared tuning machines. The pickups installed are a pair of Entwistle JBXN Single Coils that are wired to independent volume controls & a master tone. 


This Maple neck, with typical "C" profile found on most Jazz basses, plays very comfortably. The gloss finish to the rear makes for fluid and tactile playing surface while the Maple fingerboard offers a smooth & durable platform for the player's fingers. Classic Jazz Bass body contours are comfortable in the arms, with the generous cutaways providing great access to the upper register.


The two Entwistle JBXN single coil pickups installed in this instrument  deliver fantastic fundamental bass tones right away. Deep, rumbling lows will fill out your mix, whilst punchy mids and a sparkly top end will ensure that you have plenty of snap and attack to provide a lively and percussive performance. The controls keep things simple; not intruding on the playing experience but still offering ample opportunities for tone shaping. 


Brand - Revelation

Model - RBJ-67

Finish - 3-Tone Sunburst

Year - 2019

Made In- China

Body - Okoume

Neck - Maple

Neck Profile - 'C'

Fingerboard - Maple

Fingerboard Radius - 10”

Frets - 20

Scale Length- 34”

Nut Width - 1.532”

Pickups - 2x Entwistle JBXN

Controls - 2x Volume, 1x Tone


Luthier Report


Our ID: 102052597450

Weight: 10lbs

Serial Number: F20190044


Aesthetic Condition:

Headstock: Overall very good condition. The top rear edge shows a light chip which slightly exposes the wood. Further much lighter chipping is present near the D string tuning post, visible only under direct light and close scrutiny.


Neck: Overall excellent condition. Any markings to the neck and fingerboard are difficult to discern. 


Body: Overall very good condition. A mild crack in the finish has lightly chipped and slightly exposed the wood at the bass side edge of the lower bout. This is stable and should not worsen with normal use. The pickguard shows mild scratching consistent with playwear. 


Condition of Frets:

The frets demonstrate very light signs of use, not affecting playability. There is considerable material remaining for any fret work the new owner may wish to perform.


Current Set Up:

Truss Rod: Fully functional & adjustable. No truss rod tool included (hex 4mm)

Hardware: Excellent condition. 

Structural: No concerns or issues to note.
Strings on Guitar - 45-100

Height of string from 12th Fret- Treble 2.5mm - Bass 3mm

Please be aware that the action on a guitar may move slightly in transit and this measurement is the current height.


Electrics: 

Full working order.


Case & Accessories:

No case is provided with this guitar.

Truss rod tool not included. 


Please be aware that for international buyers import fees are not included in our postage and packaging cost, this only covers the cost of the guitar being sent to you. Import fees will be charged by Customs upon the guitar's arrival in the recipient country. Due to Brexit, this also applies to EU buyers. We advise checking the total import cost with Customs as this is not information we are able to accurately provide.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray Classic 2010 - Oly White — $2,175
item.description:
$2,175 · Excellent · Denton's Music Room

2010 EBMM Stingray Classic. Rare Oly white and rosewood combo. Plays and sounds great. Neck is very comfortable and no issues. 2 band EQ. Volume pot has a little bit of scratchiness but every works well. 9 lbs 8 oz and has a non original HSC that is in not great condition. Currently strung with TI rounds and plays like butter

item.title: Unbranded Ernie Ball Sterling 2014 - Gloss — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Soup Kitchen

This is a Chinese Ernie Ball Sterling I had made a few years back. Sounds and plays great. All sales finale

item.description:
$2,100 · Very Good · Sean's Gear Outlet

Great working condition. Comes with Fender case.

item.description:
$1,432.98 · Excellent · xto bass

Ernie Ball Music Man Sport Utility Bass (S.U.B.) Textured Teal 2005

Made in San Luis Obispo, Cal. USA

Rosewood fretboard

Music Man active 2-band EQ and humbucking pickup (same as in MM Stingray models)

All original

Great condition

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V with Maple Fretboard 2024 - 2023 - Avalanche — $1,650
item.description:
$1,650 · Very Good · Music Box

For sale is my Ultra II Jazz Bass 5. Overall in perfect unused condition besides 2 tiny paint chips at the bottom of the body. I have recently been diagnosed with a hand issue called Dupuytren’s contracture, which makes it difficult to play this style of neck. Unfortunately I have to stick with traditional 4 string bass guitars with a thinner neck. This is the last bass you'll ever need due to all of the tonal options it offers. Priced to sell fast.

Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass Features:

Solid select alder body; gloss finish

Bolt-on quarter-sawn maple neck, Modern D profile, Ultra Satin finish

Ebony or maple fingerboard, 10-in. to 14-in. compound radius, dot inlays

TUSQ nut; 21 medium-jumbo frets

Fender lightweight tapered Vintage Paddle tuners

2 Fender Ultra II Noiseless Vintage Jazz Bass pickups with preamp

Master volume control with push-push S-1 switch

Pan pot for pickup selection

Stacked concentric midrange boost/cut plus passive tone control

Stacked concentric treble boost/cut plus bass boost/cut

Mini-toggle midrange frequency selector

Adjustable 4-saddle HiMass bridge (string-through-body or top-load)

Fender lightweight tapered Vintage Paddle tuners

Bi-Flex truss rod, neck heel access

Crafted in the USA

Deluxe molded case included

State-of-the-art performance, vintage-inspired tone

Plug into your amp or interface, and you’ll savor legendary, punchy Jazz Bass tone with zero hum, thanks to a dynamic duo of Ultra II Noiseless Vintage Jazz Bass single-coil pickups. This arrangement gives you the low-end punch from the middle-position pickup, along with the aggressive growl from the bridge pickup. Mix up your signature blend, and you’re ready to roll. Whether it’s rock, funk, blues, country, or fusion, the Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass has you covered. Fender’s revolutionary Noiseless circuitry drives long cable runs without the noise and hum that are inherent in vintage single-coil pickup designs.

Sculpt your tone to perfection

You can plug the American Ultra II Jazz Bass into anything — from old-school tube combos to digital modeling software — and you’ll experience vintage-inspired tone with the level of performance you expect from cutting-edge modern electronics. The American Ultra II Jazz Bass is equipped with an 18-volt active preamp for optimized headroom and punch. The control layout includes a master volume control with Fender’s push-push S-1 switch, a pan pot for pickup selection, a stacked concentric midrange boost/cut plus passive tone control, a stacked concentric treble boost/cut plus bass boost/cut, and a mini-toggle midrange frequency selector. This comprehensive control set gives you the freedom to sculpt a vast array of bass tones suitable for any live gig or recording session.

item.title: Hofner HCT-500/1L-CV LEFT HANDED Cavern Beatle Bass & TWEED CASE Be a Paul M. — $979.99
item.description:
$979.99 · Mint · Barry Clark Music

This is a never been played HARD TO FIND CAVERN BASS Left Handed

HOFNER  HCT-500/1L-CV CONTEMPORARY CAVERN BEATLE BASS GUITAR Has a nice Vintage look brown burst
WITH HOFNER TWEED CASE
Recreating the style of Paul's Famous 1961 version, It features a sustain block inside the body to give modern, deep-resonating bass sounds while still retaining the original Hofner Beatles bass sound.
With a short scale of 30″ and the small violin bass body it is one of greatest electric bass guitars ever made.
The pickguard and the control panel are nicely yellowed just like the German Caverns  

Specifications

* laminate Spruce top (like the originals)
* laminate SUPER FLAME Maple Flat Back (like the originals)
* internal sustain block to increase feedback rejection
*fingerboard with 22 frets.
* Original Höfner H510 Diamond Logo Cavern Style pick-ups.
* 76 mm short scale length.
* 42 mm saddle width.
* Nickel plated hardware.
* Vintage vibe Hofner HCT-500/1 control panel with 2 volume 500k Pots & Teacup Knobs
3 Cream switches, Rhythm/Solo switches for volume Boost.
* Sunburst finish.

Strings are Hofner Round Wounds

Weight is 6.50 Lbs.
A Hofner Tweed Hard Shell Case is Included
This violin-shaped model is commonly referred to as the "Beatle bass."

With authentic details inspired by the original, the Hofner  Vintage Style Bass makes the legendary violin bass available to the rest of us.

Don't get the idea that this a just a "nowhere man" look-alike. This quality instrument features a spruce top and beautiful flamed maple back and sides.

The semi-hollow body and set neck will give you the warm, round tone you expect from the violin bass.  
Message us through the item with any questions.
Barry Clark Music
Tomah WI.

item.title: Black Over Paisley Relic 4-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $599
item.description:
$599 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars USA

The DEB4 is a 4-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a Black Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


Body

Body Material: Mahogany

Body Finish: Paisley Relic

Body Paint: Nitro

Body Construction: Solid

Neck

Neck Material: Roasted Maple

Neck Construction: One-Piece

Neck Joint: Bolt-On

Neck Finish: Satin

Neck Shape: C-shape

Scale Length: 864mm / 34"

Fretboard Material: Rosewood

Fretboard Radius: 350mm

Number of Frets: 20 Frets

Fret Material: Stainless Steel

Fret Size: Medium Jumbo

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 42mm

Position Inlays: Block Inlays

Binding: N/A

Side Dots: Glow in the Dark

Truss Rod: Dual Action 2-Way

Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Middle Pickup: N/A

Neck Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Switching: N/A

Configuration: SS

Special Electronics: 3-Band EQ

Hardware

Bridge: Hardtail

Hardware Finish: Chrome

Machine Heads: Chrome Open-Geared Clover-Style

Pickguard: Transparent

Miscellaneous/Special Features

Strings: 45-105

Weight: tbc

Accessories

Included Accessories:  Truss Rod Adjustment Key, Bridge Adjustment Key, Strap Locks

item.title: Conrad Bass 1965-1975 - Suburst — $776.20
item.description:
$776.20 · Good · Jonathan's Boutique

Hello,

I'm selling this Conrad 4-string electric bass guitar, made in Japan in the late 1960s or early 1970s. Japanese craftsmanship from that era has earned an excellent reputation and speaks for itself.

It was built in the same factories that produced instruments for brands such as Teisco, Guyatone, Zen-On, Shinko Gakki, and Matsumoku, and was sold in the United States under names including Conrad, Kent, Silvertone, St. George, Lafayette, Domino, and Kingston. This era also gave rise to renowned Japanese brands like Burny, Tokai, and Greco.

This bass belongs to the famous "lawsuit era" of Japanese instruments, when manufacturers produced high-quality copies inspired by classic American models such as the Fender Jazz Bass, Precision Bass, Gibson, Hofner Violin Bass, Rickenbacker, Gretsch, Hagstrom, and others.

It's incredibly easy to play and a real joy to use.

Specifications:

  • Product: Electric bass guitar
  • Brand: Conrad
  • 4 strings
  • Short scale (approximately 3/4, I believe). I can measure the scale length upon request.
  • Late 1960s / early 1970s
  • Fitted with upgraded Seymour Duncan Antiquity Single-Coil P-Bass pickups (I'm not sure whether they're the Antiquity II or the '50s version—I'll check if needed). These pickups alone cost over €300 and perfectly match the vintage character of the instrument.

The bass is in good condition. The electronics could probably use a quick clean, as the controls can be a little scratchy at times.

It comes with its original cardboard hard case.

I'm selling it because I haven't played it in years, and it makes me sad to see such a lovely instrument sitting unused.

Collection is preferred near Montreuil (just outside Paris). Shipping possible.

item.title: Spector 00 1980s - Black tolex — $300
item.description:
$300 · Good · Gil's Gear Outlet

Hey you bass players searching for a period case for your Spector NS here you are! Well worn road worthy structurally in tact latches hinges perfect hold open no issues no bad smells ready for you to take back out on the road! Do you want a 1980-1990 Spector by Kramer case this is the one! Logo is good no interior rips. as you can see it has seen many gigs and is still ready for more! These don’t come up offer grab it now! Case is 48” long 13 1/2 wide and standard depth fits vintage NS bass guitars.

item.title: SIRE JAZZ BASS PREAMP SOLDERLESS BRAND NEW — $149
item.description:
$149 · Excellent · Retrovoice

Brand new jazz bass preamp with vintage passive tone control and bass, midrange and treble controls. This has a plate mounted output jack, so NO need for a side mounted bass body output jack. These sound incredible-super low noise and infinite tone shaping possibilities. Also has active/passive toggle switch for use with no battery. This preamp opens up a world of possibilities and offers more tone shaping than most of the preamps on the market. This is a solderless version that allows you to make all the connections with just bare wires to the screw terminals. It runs on either a single 9 volt battery with the prewired battery connector, or can be rewired for any anything in between 9 and 18 volts, so one or two nine volt batteries, or a single miniature 12 volt (size 23A) battery will work. A 23A battery will fit in most cavities if a 9 volt battery is too large. Includes wiring diagram. Please note the glare in the photo of the control panel is from the removable clear protective film on it.

item.title: Univox U1970F-Fretted model 1970's with thermometer case — $700
item.description:
$700 · Good · Stonypond Studios

I got this in trade, but I don't play bass but it was so cool looking, I took it. Plays nice, has foam mutes on the ashtray cover so it really sounds like a Beatle bass. Looks like a Gibson EB violin body. Really nice. And, a perfect hard shell and rare, thermometer case. Sold used and as is.

item.title: Yamaha BB435 5-String Bass Guitar - Teal Blue — $463
item.description:
$463 · Excellent · Trail

Completely stock and essentially brand new.


I would keep it, but the finish just didn’t inspire me in person. I took it out of the box to test the passive pickups and 18mm string spacing, took these photos, and put it right back into its packaging.


No flaws. It still has the protective plastic over the pickguard, and comes with the original Yamaha box and tools.

item.title: Greco TV-800SE Made in Japan midscale 32" 2002 — $1,074.74
item.description:
$1,074.74 · Very Good · Michał's Gear Outlet

Japanese rarity from the early 2000s – Greco TV-800SE in Brown Burst finish. Year 2002, manufactured in March (serial number C021503). Visually it looks great, and the wood stripes show through the finish beautifully and clearly.

The TV series from Greco consists of instruments with a serious rock pedigree. This particular model is the signature of Seiichi Iida – bassist of the bands CRAZE and ZI:KILL, which were highly popular in Japan back then. Visually, it's a successful nod to double-cut designs in the style of the TV Bass. However, it's not a classic, blind copy – the Japanese modified this design for modern, heavier playing.

The body is made entirely of solid maple, and the neck is maple and bolt-on. The rosewood fretboard with 22 frets features the distinctive TV-SE inlay. The biggest manual asset of this bass is its scale – it's a medium scale (32 inches). Thanks to the shorter neck, the distance between frets is smaller, making the bass exceptionally handy and agile. The nut width is a comfortable 40 mm.

Two Greco Power Storm humbuckers and active electronics with a 2-band EQ are responsible for the tone. The control layout consists of Master Volume, Pickup Balancer, Bass, and Treble. The maple body combined with these electronics delivers a bright, articulate sound with a fast attack. When played with a pick, the bass generates a powerful, growling midrange that easily cuts through the mix. Tuning stability is ensured by reliable Gotoh hardware and a massive bridge.

I rate the visual condition as a solid 8/10. The instrument has some years on it and shows normal signs of use in the form of shallow scratches or minor dings visible under the light, but there are no paint chips or wood damage. The whole thing still looks fresh.

Technically, the bass is fully ready to play. The truss rod is functional, works smoothly, and allows for precise relief adjustment. The original frets show light signs of wear but are tall, even, and require no luthier intervention. The string action is currently set comfortably at 1.8-2 mm over the 12th fret – it plays softly and without any dead notes. The weight is 4.4 kg, and the solid mass translates into a long, stable sustain.

The guitar comes with a decent gigbag. Testing it out in Poznań is welcome, and secure shipping is not a problem. Shipping from Poznań, Poland. This is a private sale. No trades.

item.title: Left handed fretless Peavey Foundation 1987 — $500
item.description:
$500 · Good · Leather Entertainment-Gear for Sale

Is an extremely rare left-handed fretless. I believe it to be about 1987/88. All original with dual grover tuners, super ferrite pickups and even the rubber grip on 2 knobs. Fretboard shows little wear. There are some chips and nicks on the back, the front is in great shape. The neck is really nice, almost a figured maple. Great left handed fretless bass.

item.title: Schecter 004 Active Bass Guitar - 2008 — $599
item.description:
$599 · Excellent · Cooch's Guitar & Bass

This bass is a pretty rare find. Rumor is the 004 was Schecter's answer to the Ric 4001. I don't see it but who knows. Schecter built this bass between 2000 - 2008 when it was discontinued. In 2015, the design was brought back and is still made today as the Stargazer although with very different electronics.

This bass is in amazing condition for an 18 year old instrument. With the exception of 3 or 4 tiny nicks along the edges, it is near perfect. A true closet queen.

It has a solid Ash body with a natural finish, a maple neck with a Rosewood fretboard. It has EMG HZ pickups with an active EQ switchable on/off by pulling up/down on the volume control. A nice feature. The controls are V/BL/T/B. The EQ is just tremendous. You can get searing highs and picture rattling off the walls lows out of this EQ. It takes one 9V battery with a 200 hr life. It comes with Schecter tuners, a brass nut, a HiMass bridge that can be strung through the body or the bridge. The truss rod is two way and works perfectly. The frets show no wear. The electronics are clean. No scratchy pots. No noise at all. I did a complete setup including setting the trussrod, action, pickup heights, intonation, and a new set of 40-100 roundwounds. It sounds amazing and plays like butter.

This is one of the best playing basses I've ever owned. A slim profile neck with low low action. No fret buzz, no dead spots I can find. It's very well balanced, no neck dive. It is a little on the beefy side (a tad over 9 lbs). But the extra pound in weight is well worth it for the sound with the denser woods.

I ship professionally packed ground, fully insured through Reverb Safe Ship.

item.title: Ibanez BTB805MS-TGF Bass Workshop 2022 - Present - Transparent Gray Flat — $1,254.83
item.description:
$1,254.83 · Excellent · Andrew Bamford

Barely played Ibanex 805MS. I played it once, comes in a hard case and contrary to the photos has Ernie ball strings.

item.title: Ibanez SR300E-PW Standard Soundgear Bass 2016 - Present - Pearl White — $306.74
item.description:
$306.74 · Good · B.Anthony

Very good, highly playable bass. It has a nice thin neck, is very light, ergonmic and comfortable. It has very little, if any, head dive thanks to the upper horn and it also looks really cool.

All electronics work and for the money is a very capable and versatile beast. Pickups are humbucking and is good for any genre. Still not sure what the power tap does. I will link a Demo video from *Andertons* If you want to learn more about all its features etc.

There are a few small blemishes and cracks that you only really notice when you are looking for them but this doesnt compromise playability at all, just a small cosmetic issue, Images have been attatched.

I havent played it for a while so it would be a good Idea to give it a string change and a setup.

item.title: Fender Mustang 1971 Refinished from original green to natural — $2,999
item.description:
$2,999 · Very Good · CT Anderson

I am not the original owner of this vintage, Fender Mustang, and the bassist I purchased this from equipped the instrument with Nordstrand pickups along with a new wiring harness. I am uncertain if this is the original bridge but I replaced the intonation screws, which allowed for easier adjustment. The neck is straight and the frets have plenty of life left. The original color was green, which you can see in the neck pocket. I really love the natural finish and patinas with the hardware. The bass sounds great and plays like a charm. I have Labella flats ( newly replaced) and the sound great. This is an amazing classic! Hard shell case included.

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003W Walnut 2026 - Natural — $2,050
item.description:
$2,050 · Excellent · Joshua's Gear Outlet

2026 Rickenbacker 4003W purchased just a few months ago. I just find myself still reaching for my pj and ray more. In excellent condition, comes with original hardshell case and candy. Please message me if you have any questions. Thanks!

item.title: Fender Vintage Hot Rod '60s Precision Bass Natural 2014 American USA — $2,961.50
item.description:
$2,961.50 · Excellent · Michał's Gear Outlet

Fender Vintage Hot Rod '60s Precision Bass, 2014, Natural color. Made in USA.

This series had a very short production run, only between 2013 and 2014, making it rare on the secondhand market today. Fender combined the visual vibe of the '60s (old spaghetti logo, nitro finish, engraved neck plate) with modern solutions that improve playing comfort.

The body is ash in a Natural finish, covered with a thin nitrocellulose lacquer, allowing the wood to resonate well. The maple neck with a "C" profile is finished with a fast satin on the back, while the front of the headstock has a gloss finish. The rosewood fingerboard features a compound radius (7.25" - 12") – round at the bottom for comfortable grooving, and flatter higher up to facilitate faster runs. Posiflex graphite rods sit inside the neck, and the bone nut has a standard width of 41.3 mm. The weight of the instrument is a very reasonable 4.1 kg, and the bass is well-balanced.

Soundwise, it is a passive PJ setup featuring Custom Shop pickups: an American Vintage '63 Precision Bass split-coil in the middle and an American Vintage '64 Jazz Bass single-coil at the bridge. The use of independent volume potentiometers for each pickup (Vol/Vol/Tone layout) yields excellent results. Changing the balance between them strongly affects the sound character – a minimal turn of the knob noticeably shifts the center of gravity. You can go from the fat, thumping low end of the Precision alone, through a rock growl with a defined midrange with both pickups wide open, to a honky, nasal sound dominated by the Jazz pickup at the bridge. The bridge is a massive Fender Hi-Mass improving sustain, and the tuners are lightweight vintage-paddles.

I rate the condition of the instrument as excellent. The only sign of use is a roughly one-centimeter dull spot in the nitro lacquer where the forearm rests – however, it is so subtle that it is barely visible. Other than that, the finish shines, the hardware works like new, the truss rod turns smoothly, and the original Medium Jumbo frets are in perfect condition and do not need any work.

Included in the sale is the full factory kit: the original blonde case with orange plush interior, the chrome pickup fence, and the documents. The bass is 100% original.

This is a private sale. The instrument can be tested in Poznań, Poland, or safely shipped from Poznań, Poland. No trades.

item.title: Ken Smith BSR6 Walnut Maple — $6,399
item.description:
$6,399 · Fair · BAMonBASS Gear Emporium

2007 Ken Smith BSR6 walnut body wings with a maple core, smith hardshell case. Bass has a hairline crack shown in the pics which is why it is priced low. Sold as is. Plays great and sounds amazing.

item.title: Ibanez EHB1505 5 String Ergonomic Headless Bass — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Excellent · GotBass?

Ibanez headless 5 string

Insane bass. So incredibly comfortable to play. Neck and fretboard are perfect.
Nordstand setup will kick your front teeth in. This bass can do everything you need and then some.

B string is tight and plays great.

It’s in awesome condition. No major dings or scratches, virtually no play wear. Overall very clean.

Its setup low, plays and sounds excellent. No issues to mention.

Packed with care and ships Insured.

item.title: Fender precision custom shop 1962 PBass - Fiesta red — $4,775.42
item.description:
$4,775.42 · Mint · David's Gear Depot

En perfecto estado. Sin estuche, lo puedo entregar con una funda mono.

item.title: Fender AJB Aerodyne Jazz Bass Olympic White 2010-2011 — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Very Good · Evan's Gear Outlet

Great condition, recently rewired with quality electronic components (pickups are original), original knobs included in sale. Please reach out with any additional questions.

item.title: Fender JMJ - Black with BRAND NEW Gator Gig Bag/Case — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Excellent · 4StringP's Boutique

Fender JMJ | Black with BRAND NEW Gator Gig Bag

Includes all paperwork and an unused -sealed in bag- black pickguard.

Ships in BRAND NEW Gator Pro Series Gig Bag/Case (Gator ProGo Elec Gtr Gig Bag).

Notes:

  • Stand and/or Strap where/if pictured is NOT INCLUDED.
  • Non smoking, non pet home.
  • Free shipping to Continental U.S. only.

Feel free to reach out with any specific questions and/or additional pictures you would like to see.

item.title: Squier Sonic Bronco Bass - Laurel Fingerboard, Daphne Blue — $272.24
item.description:
$272.24 · Brand New · MSP Web

*Brand New Instrument in Pristine Condition!
**Squier Authorized Dealers in Quebec City, Canada!!

The Squier Sonic Bronco Bass is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This Bronco Bass sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a short 30" scale length, 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, sealed-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight.

Features : 

  • Short 30" scale length
  • Squier single-coil pickup
  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge
  • Sealed-gear tuning machines
  • Chrome hardware

---

[1] Our listings may use generic pictures of the same model or pictures from a different unit of the same model. Ask us if you want to see some pictures of the available units.

[2] Our Shipping Flat Rates or free shipping include full insurance of the total value of the item, and apply for most Metropolitan areas in North America. Locations outside major Metropolitan areas might be subject to EXTRA shipping costs for the buyer. If that situation applies, please send us a message including your ZIP code to verify your personalized and accurate quote on shipping rates and extra fees.

[3] All Custom fees are the responsibilities of the buyer. Buyer must contact Custom to insure a correct custom rate. We cannot do any custom quote or be responsible for any customs fees.

[4] All instruments are inspected and set up before shipping, therefore all boxes could be opened. We may also ship in a different box if we judge it is more secure to use a better packaging. If an instrument needs a setup at destination, there are the sole buyer responsibilities as the instrument has been verified and set up before shipping.

[5] There is NO return for international transactions and overseas shipping. Our return policy does not apply to International transactions, only to the Canadian market. It is the Buyer’s responsibility to verify if the manufacturer will accept the warranty for an international transaction, otherwise they will be considered as used.

[6] If an item arrives Damaged, please send us pictures of the external box and damage within the first 24 hours. Failure to do so will automatically void the insurance with the carrier. Keep the box until further notice and wait for our instructions for the next step. Having an instrument setup by yourself or a non-certified technician could void the warranty and insurance on shipping.

[7] All used items are final sales, the return policy does not apply.


Visit our website or call us anytime if you need more information +1-418-831-9010 !

item.title: Squier Sonic Precision Bass - Laurel Fingerboard, Midnight Blue — $279.59
item.description:
$279.59 · Brand New · MSP Web

*Brand New Instrument in Pristine Condition!
**Squier Authorized Dealers in Quebec City, Canada!!

The Squier Sonic Precision Bass is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This P Bass sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier split single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone. Further details of this model include a 4-saddle hardtail bridge for precise intonation adjustment, open-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning and durable chrome-plated hardware that is sure to catch the spotlight.

  • Squier split single-coil pickup
  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge
  • Open-gear tuning machines

It is the Buyer’s responsibility to verify if the manufacturer will accept the warranty for an international transaction, otherwise they will be considered as used.

[6] If an item arrives Damaged, please send us pictures of the external box and damage within the first 24 hours. Failure to do so will automatically void the insurance with the carrier. Keep the box until further notice and wait for our instructions for the next step. item.title: Jackson Pro Series Adam Blackstone Signature "Gladys" Concert Bass 2024 - Present - Black Stone — $699.99
item.description:
$699.99 · Excellent · Pirate Sam's Custom Art Guitars

Jackson Pro Series Signature Adam Blackstone "Gladys" Concert 5-string Bass Guitar - Black Stone -

$999.99 retail

BLOW OUT PRICED only $699.99 and you get a one off custom art bass ! I call this one : " Liberty for all colors "

This one has been turned into a custom art bass by Pirate Sam ( Sam McCready ) Original finish was sanded down to the bare wood then the graphics were inked in followed by a few light coats of clear semi gloss paint to protect the graphics when playing it !

This is a BRAND NEW - mint condition overstock bass that Fender sold to the MIRC corp where it was inspected and set up for sale to MIRC dealers .

They weighs in at around lbs oz -

Writer, producer, and musical director extraordinaire Adam Blackstone has spent over two decades backing some of the biggest names in the music business, with a musical résumé that lists the likes of Nicki Minaj, Justin Timberlake, Eminem, and countless others. The Jackson Pro Series Signature Adam Blackstone “Gladys” Concert bass guitar — lovingly named after Adam’s grandmother — encapsulates his diverse musical talents in a single high-performance 5-string. Starting with a lightweight poplar body paired with a graphite-reinforced maple neck, this bass offers exquisite playability thanks to its 21 jumbo frets and compound-radius maple fingerboard. A pair of Jackson BBE J-style pickups grant both warm, jazzy thump and biting grit, bolstered by a flexible 3-band active EQ. It’s all bookended with a top-shelf hardware combo consisting of a HiMass bridge and old-school open-back tuners. Representing the very best of 5-string versatility and performance, the Pro Series Signature Adam Blackstone “Gladys” Concert bass is a true workhorse ready to excel in any stage or studio application you could ever dream of.

item.title: Lakland Skyline 5 String 55-01 - Natural — $699.95
item.description:
$699.95 · Excellent · Mahar's Vintage Guitars

Lakland has been building serious basses in Chicago since 1994, and the Skyline series represents the company's offshore production line.  These are Korean-built instruments that apply Lakland's design philosophy and quality control to a more accessible price point without abandoning the specifications that make Lakland basses genuinely different from the standard Fender-derived alternatives. The 55-01 is the five-string entry point into the Skyline lineup, and it is built around two specifications that set it apart from most production five-strings: the 35" scale length and the Lakland Dual Access bridge.

The 35" scale is the defining tonal specification for the 55-01. The additional scale length increases string tension across all five strings, which on a B string specifically produces the tight, focused, piano-like low B character that 34" scale five-strings consistently struggle to achieve. String tension at 35" keeps the B string sounding like a note rather than a loosely vibrating rope — a practical and audible difference that players who have played both scale lengths consistently describe as immediately and unmistakably different for the low end.

The Lakland Dual Access bridge allows stringing through the body or through the bridge — two distinct tonal options from the same instrument, with body-through stringing adding sustain and low-end warmth and bridge-through providing a slightly brighter, more immediate attack. The Bartolini MK-1 split-coil soapbar pickups provide the hum-cancelling character and warm, detailed tone that Bartolini is known for in the bass pickup world, driven by the five-knob active preamp — volume, blend, treble, mid, and bass — for comprehensive tonal shaping. Hipshot Licensed Ultralight tuners keep the headstock weight in check on a 35" five-string that could otherwise become neck-heavy. Flat-sawn maple neck with graphite reinforcement bars for dimensional stability, 10"-12" compound radius maple fingerboard, 22 frets, 1-3/4" nut. Action set at 3/32" on the first string and 4/32" on the fifth at the twelfth fret. At 9 lbs 6.5 oz this is a well-balanced five-string. Non-original generic hardshell case in excellent condition included.

We set the bass up, which worked out easily and perfectly, and added a new set of strings.  This bass is good to go!

Mahar's Vintage Guitars is a brick-and-mortar and web-based retailer. We are happy to talk with you before you make a purchase.   Please reach out if you feel so inclined! We cross market our items here and on our own site, so items are subject to sale elsewhere at any time (however we will never cancel a sale if it happens here first). See our profile here, our Google reviews as well as our 100% positive Reverb feedback. Also, Reverb limits us to only 25 pictures of our items. There is a good chance we have more. Contact us if you’d like to see them.

No sales tax for direct sale customers outside California. Reverb sales are always taxed.

SPECS:

  • Weight: 9lbs 6.5oz
  • Color: natural
  • Body Material: ash
  • Body Condition: excellent
  • Body Original?: yes
  • Body Repairs: none
  • Body Binding: none
  • Body Length: 19-5/8"
  • Body Finish Original?: yes
  • Body Finish Condition: excellent
  • Lower Bout: 13-1/4"
  • Waist: 9"
  • Upper Bout: 11"
  • Body Depth/Thickness: 1-5/8"
  • Strap Buttons: yes
  • Scale Length: 35"
  • Neck Material: Flat-sawn Maple with Graphite reinforcement bars
  • Neck Profile: n/a
  • Neck Thickness At 1st Fret: .8045"
  • Neck Thickness At 12th Fret: .9285"
  • Action 1st String At 12th Fret: 3/32"
  • Action 5th String At 12th Fret: 4/32"
  • Neck Condition: excellent
  • Neck Repairs: none
  • Neck Finish Original?: yes
  • Neck Screws Original?: yes
  • Fretboard Material: maple
  • Fretboard Condition: excellent
  • Fretboard Repairs: none
  • Fretboard Radius: 10" - 12" compound
  • Fret Condition: excellent
  • Fret Repairs: none
  • Fret Count: 22
  • Nut Material: synthetic bone
  • Nut Repairs: none
  • Nut Width: 1-3/4"
  • Bridge Brand: Lakland Dual Access (strings through the body or through the bridge)
  • Bridge Original?: yes
  • Saddle Material: metal
  • Saddles Original?: yes
  • Bridge And Saddle Crews Original?: yes
  • String Spacing At Bridge: 3.0405"
  • Bridge Condition: excellent
  • Tuner Brand And Model: Hipshot Licensed Ultralites
  • Tuners Original?: yes
  • Changes To Headstock For Tuners?: none
  • Tuner Condition: excellent
  • Tuner Markings: n/a
  • Tuner Screws Original?: yes
  • Truss Rod Cover: none
  • Overall Length: 46"
  • Case Brand: generic
  • Case Original?: no
  • Case Condition: excellent
  • Case Smells?: none
  • Pickup Brand: Bartolini MK-1 Split-Coil Soapbar Pickups
  • Pickup Count: 2
  • Pickup Original?: yes
  • Pickup Condition: excellent
  • Pickup Screws Original?: yes
  • Pickup Cover Color: black
  • Knob Color: black
  • Knob Count: 5
  • Knobs Original?: yes
  • Knob Condition: excellent
  • Control Cavity Cover Material: plastic
  • Control Cavity Cover Original?: yes
  • Control Cavity Condition: excellent
  • Potentiometer Count: 5
  • Potentiometers Original?: yes
  • Potentiometer Condition: excellent
  • Solders Original?: yes
  • Wiring Original?: yes
  • Output Jack Plate Color: chrome
  • Output Jack Plate Condition: excellent
  • Screws Original?: yes
  • Output Jack Original?: yes
  • Documentation: none
  • Smells?: none
  • Accessories Included: none

Shipping Policy
By completing your purchase you are agreeing to this shipping policy. Shipments require signature on delivery, no exceptions. Less than 1% of our shipments are damaged in transit, and we are committed to making sure your item arrives safely. If there is damage, retain all packing materials intact, photograph them immediately, and send the photos to .

Stringed Instruments: Multiple shipping speeds are available for orders on our website — Ground, 2 Day, 3 Day, and Next Day Air Saver. For Reverb orders: customers from any state that is more than a 3 day UPS ground shipment from our shop will get their shipment via UPS 3 day air. Otherwise, ground shipping will be used.

item.title: Fender American Standard Jazz 2013 3 Color Sunburst — $1,095
item.description:
$1,095 · Excellent · Tim's Gear Bazaar

For your consideration here is a beautiful Fender American Standard Jazz bass! The bass is in excellent condition and it plays and sounds absolutely fantastic! The frets have plenty of life left on them and all electronics works just as they should! The bass weighs in at 9 pounds and 4 ounces! It has been recently setup by a professional tech and it’s right as rain! I replaced the tort pickguard with a cream/pearl/cream and it looks 100% better to me! The tort guard will come with it too! The deluxe fender case is also included and is in excellent condition too! I’ll only ship within the USA. Thanks

item.title: Ibanez GSR200 Gio Soundgear - Transparent Red — $130
item.description:
$130 · Very Good · B's Guitars

Ibanez GSR200 Gio electric bass. In great shape. No major damage, some minor scratches and scuffs. Neck is straight and it plays very well. Great sounding electric bass. Electronics work as they should. Local pickup in Ocoee, FL also available.

item.title: Warwick CO Streamer LX, 4 String 2008 - Black — $3,137.07
item.description:
$3,137.07 · Excellent · James Cole Boutique

A beautiful custom shop Bass made for Wayne Banks. Created for and performed with during his years playing bass with Robin Gibb.

CO Streamer LX, 4-string,

SD CU PU

item.title: Bartolini T4CBC-T and T4CBC-B 2010’s — $100
item.description:
$100 · Excellent · Proper Bass

Hello, this is a set of barely used Bartolini Thunderbird pickups, they sound great.

item.title: FENDER 62 Jazz Bass Relic Custom Shop 2012 Candy Apple Red — $4,955.73
item.description:
$4,955.73 · Excellent · Le Guitarium

2012 FENDER 62 Jazz Bass Relic Custom Shop Candy Apple Red

A beautiful ’62 reissue Jazz Bass in Candy Apple Red finish (with matching headstock).

The bass is in very good condition; the sound is superb—dynamic and balanced.

It is all original, with no repairs or modifications.

Comes with the certificate and original case; the two chrome covers are missing.

4.220 kg
